member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Orchestration.Contracts.JwtToken.ITokenOrchestration`1
member.summary: Contract for orchestrating JWT token generation, validation, and revocation.
member.typeparam: The type of the key used to identify entities, must implement .

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Orchestration.Contracts.JwtToken.ITokenOrchestration`1.GenerateTokenAsync(System.Security.Claims.ClaimsPrincipal,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Generates a new JWT access token for the given principal.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Orchestration.Contracts.JwtToken.ITokenOrchestration`1.GetExpirationTime
member.summary: Gets the expiration time for a newly issued token.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Orchestration.Contracts.JwtToken.ITokenOrchestration`1.ValidateTokenAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Validates a JWT token and returns the associated claims principal if valid.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Orchestration.Contracts.JwtToken.ITokenOrchestration`1.GetExpirationAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the expiration timestamp from an existing token.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Orchestration.Contracts.JwtToken.ITokenOrchestration`1.IsAccessTokenRevokedAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Checks if a given access token has been revoked.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Orchestration.Contracts.JwtToken.ITokenOrchestration`1.IsRefreshTokenRevokedAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Checks if a given refresh token has been revoked.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Orchestration.Contracts.UserManager.IAuthenticationOrchestration`1
member.summary: Contract for orchestrating user authentication workflows. Validates credentials using ASP.NET Core Identity and issues JWT tokens.
member.typeparam: The type of the unique identifier for the user, typically Guid or string.
